steps.title: Identify what must be emphasized
steps.content: The question asks to “emphasize when she collected both of the samples”—we must highlight the timing for both collections.

steps.title: Find the choice showing both collection dates
steps.content: Choice B provides both dates—November of 1926 and February of 1930—and links them with “after” to show their chronological relationship. Choices A, C, and D either mention only one date, omit dates entirely, or focus on location or current location instead of timing. That matches choice B — B is correct.
